_meta.extraction_source: Five Ashterothi transcripts (auto-captions pulled via yt-dlp). Curator-owned annotation; not a republication of source material.

sources.title: BREAKING NEWS! CALDARI INVADES THE SYNDICATE!!!! - EVE Universe Show YC128.05.05
New Eden News: Warpath YC128-04-21 - YC128-04-30
Silphy - The Faction Leader You Never Hear About (recorded YC126.04.04)
New Eden News - Warnings Raised Over Drifter Wormhole Experiments (YC127-10-30)
Lore Tourism - The Redemption of the Ammatar
sources._note: Captions pulled but not yet extracted — 40K words, deferred for separate pass

nodes.name: Warpath Protocol Failure
nodes.brief: CONCORD's war-response system disabled by cyberattack of unprecedented complexity. Within minutes, four-empire cross-incursions in highsec. Single message left: 'Warpath, a gift dear empires. After all, toys are meant to be played with.' Origin unknown.

nodes.name: Jita Gate Incident
nodes.brief: All seven stargates damaged simultaneously by hyperspace fractures matching those seen in fractured fields. Death toll in thousands. Mechanism: manipulation of Drifter Hyperspace Network data-transfer layer. Ongoing radiation visible from nearby systems.

nodes.name: Silphy Summoned to New Caldari
nodes.brief: Intaki Syndicate Chair summoned for inquest into Syndicate involvement in gate disaster. Three days before her arrest.

nodes.name: Arrest of Silphy en Diabel
nodes.brief: Detained in New Caldari by Lai Dai Protection Services. Two Syndicate agents convicted in March named her under plea agreement.

nodes.name: Caldari Conquest of Syndicate
nodes.brief: Caldari Navy declared sovereignty over all 106 Syndicate systems. Most local authorities surrendered with limited fire exchange. First forcible empire annexation of nullsec in modern history.

nodes.name: Syndicate Capital Breakout
nodes.brief: Three escort intercept windows in highsec constellations Pelille / Bayet / Orvolle. Capsuleer bounty-paid kills on Syndicate fugitive capitals using captured highsec-cyno tech.

nodes.name: Capsuleer Day XXIII — Warpath
nodes.brief: Live event encompassing Warpath cross-empire incursions, Syndicate conquest, capital breakout, capital-doomsday site rollout. Run-up to Fanfest YC128.

nodes.name: Capital Support / Doomsday Site Rollout
nodes.brief: PvE site requiring cap-booster delivery to allied Titan; success triggers doomsday on hostile Titan.

nodes.name: Gallente Presidential Election YC128
nodes.brief: Alix Moreau (Autonomist) won 34.8% — narrowly beat Soraya Roden (Progressive). Lucas Tenzin third. One of the closest elections on record.

nodes.name: Drifter Wormhole Summit
nodes.brief: Held at Jita IV-4 (YC126). Five wormhole occupiers promoted destructive testing of the Drifter hyperspace network.

nodes.name: AMP Raises Drifter Experiment Warnings
nodes.brief: Anoyus Mapping Project published findings of erratic hyperspace telemetry inside Drifter wormholes. Founder Rio Talifo flagged risk of spillover to known space. Akimaka Saraki dismissed AMP as Gallente puppet.

nodes.name: Drifter Crisis (final stages)
nodes.brief: Five factions pushed Drifters out of wormhole space; took possession of Drifter pillar formations. Triggered the destructive-testing era.

nodes.name: Starkmanir Liberation (Imperian Age)
nodes.brief: Elder Fleet revealed Nefantar (Ammatar) had hidden surviving Starkmanir from Amarr eradication. Starkmanir restored as Minmatar tribe.

nodes.name: YC123 Dread Assaults (Tama / Junfaa)
nodes.brief: Mercenary fleets used illegal high-sec-authorized cyno beacons to land dread assaults. Established canonical existence of empire-circumventing cyno tech.

nodes.name: CONCORD System Failure YC110
nodes.brief: Caused destruction of CONCORD's Bureau station in Yulai. General blackout. Cited as the prior precedent for systemic CONCORD failure (Warpath being more targeted).

nodes.name: Federation Seizure of Intaki
nodes.brief: Federation aggressively removed Intaki + two adjacent constellations from FW war zone, made them full Federation property. Triggered the 'Uprising' arc and the original Caldari–Intaki Syndicate constellation deal.

nodes.name: Ishukone Wins Intaki Development Rights
nodes.brief: Following the Caldari system auction, Ishukone secured development rights to the Intaki system. Established the Ishukone–Intaki anchoring that Silphy later exploits.

nodes.name: Death of Otro Gariushi (Quantum Rise summit)
nodes.brief: Caldari–Federation summit attacked: a Nyx mothership collided with the station, framed as Alexander Noir's act. Station and ship safety protections were disabled — not the work of a normal pilot. Mens Reppola became Ishukone CEO afterward.

nodes.name: Zephyr Ship Distribution (Apocrypha)
nodes.brief: Polymath Valus en Diabel authorized Intaki Syndicate to mass-distribute the Zephyr — a sleeper-ignored exploration ship — to all registered capsuleers. Later revealed to carry covert telemetry/sensor packages funneling wormhole data back to Syndicate (and onward).

nodes.name: Innerbus → Evermore Transition
nodes.brief: Innerbus chief had a fatal heart attack mid-Yulai dispute (Stellar Transmuters era, Amarr-aligned). Within days, the son installed a new leader who restructured the corp into Evermore and unveiled a pre-prepared AI assistant. Ash flags this as Amarr-targeting shenanigans.

nodes.name: Ashterothi
nodes.brief: EVE lore content creator. Voice of New Eden show. Has been mapping Lai Dai vs Ishukone conspiracy axis for several weeks. Treats Mountain + Ocean factions as anti-Forest.

nodes.name: Alix Moreau
nodes.brief: Gallente Federation President (YC128–). Autonomist Party. Inaugurated under Jita-gate cloud. Issued amnesty to Syndicate descendants. Hawkish Senate factions concerned about her military inexperience.

nodes.name: Soraya Roden
nodes.brief: Progressive Party candidate, runner-up. Roden Shipyards heir. Sponsored by Quafe per Ash. Hawkish military posture.

nodes.name: Lucas Tenzin
nodes.brief: Independent candidate, third place. Federal-unity / diplomacy / disadvantaged-citizens platform.

nodes.name: Silphy en Diabel
nodes.brief: Intaki Syndicate Chair, governor of Poitot. Former Sister of EVE; expelled after Serpentis collaboration. Estranged ally of Sentona Sarpati. Engineered Pas station famine and Aukron coup to seize power. Detained YC128.05.01.

nodes.name: Dorne en Diabel
nodes.brief: Original unifying Syndicate leader; Silphy's father. Albino, charismatic. Died in a freak accident before clone transfer was possible.

nodes.name: Garyn en Diabel
nodes.brief: Silphy's older brother. Inherited Poitot station after Dorne's death. Politically weak; eventually displaced by Silphy.

nodes.name: Valus en Diabel
nodes.brief: Intaki polymath who designed the Zephyr as minimalist demonstration. Authorized Syndicate mass distribution YC111.

nodes.name: Sentona Sarpati
nodes.brief: Reverend Mother / SoE CEO. Sister of Salvador Sarpati (Serpentis). Once Silphy's closest ally, now her bitter rival; mockingly calls her 'Queen Silphy of the Syndicate.' Conspicuously absent from current news cycle.

nodes.name: Salvador Sarpati
nodes.brief: Head of Serpentis Corporation. Sentona's brother. Silphy's collaborator during her black-market rise.

nodes.name: Otro Gariushi
nodes.brief: Former Ishukone CEO. Gariushi (Guristas-aligned) pilot. Ousted Akelan in a corruption exposé using Riley Rashemo and the Raven project. Killed at Caldari–Federation summit (Quantum Rise) when a Nyx rammed the station.

nodes.name: Mens Reppola
nodes.brief: Ishukone CEO since Otro's death. Ash's stream centers him as Ishukone-axis anchor. Working with Mortis Legion (Muria Moru) on clone-soldier development. Heavily drone-protected; in semi-hiding by Templar 1's end.

nodes.name: Miller Reppola
nodes.brief: Mens's sister. Ishukone CFO. Helped Otro engineer Akelan's removal via blackmail of Riley Rashemo.

nodes.name: Raleigh
nodes.brief: Top Ishukone engineer. Built the android Vilamo. Developing cybernetic implant tech (hippocampus / thalamus replacement) for Templar prototypes.

nodes.name: Gable (codename: Lifegiver)
nodes.brief: Caldari-born scientist; converted to Amarrian faith. Treats the Templar prototype — the only patient with full hippocampus / thalamus cybernetic replacement. Ash identifies her as the 'Lifegiver' figure surfacing in YC128 events.

nodes.name: Mr. Lacante
nodes.brief: Tattooed contact in Silphy's Antagonists chronicle. Likely Thukker. Coordinates the Zephyr telemetry data trade with Ishukone (the 'token Ishukone won't be able to resist').

nodes.name: Akimaka Saraki
nodes.brief: Chairman of CEP. Mountain Faction. Speaks for Caldari mega-corp consensus through the Warpath crisis. Pledged Caldari 'protection' of Syndicate Intaki against Syndicate leadership itself. Allied with Ocean faction against Forest.

nodes.name: Haikoriggo
nodes.brief: Caldari Navy Executive General. Led Syndicate operation. Spoke from Intaki Syndicate Bureau on Poitot.

nodes.name: Alexander Ducasse
nodes.brief: Evermore President. Mediator in the Caldari–Jita-resident negotiations. Controls IMN media network. Per Ash, his rise to power and Evermore's restructuring suggest pre-prepared takeover targeting Amarr.

nodes.name: Empress Catiz I
nodes.brief: Amarr Empress. Cast blame on Republic during Warpath escalation. SKIN 'Mandate of Faith' attributed to her call.

nodes.name: Celestis Aguard
nodes.brief: Stargate Trailblazer figure. Built Kenninck–Egghelende stargate now serving as the only contiguous Gallente connection after Syndicate annexation.

nodes.name: Rio Talifo
nodes.brief: Founder/patron of Anoyus Mapping Project. Has a character seeded in every wormhole system. Public face of the warning that Drifter-tech experimentation could destabilize known space.

nodes.name: Anar Abdul
nodes.brief: Thukker chief who echoed AMP's concerns over Republic-backed experimentation in liberated Barbican. First cross-empire validation of the Drifter-tech risk warning.

nodes.name: Ukumi Pol
nodes.brief: Brutor Chief. Pointed fingers at Amarr post-Jita-gate, invoking Tuvan as historical precedent for reckless tech abuse.

nodes.name: Caldari State
nodes.brief: Eight mega-corp federation. Annexed Syndicate YC128.05.05.

nodes.name: Gallente Federation
nodes.brief: Moreau presidency. Disputed Caldari accusations re: Jita-gate.

nodes.name: Minmatar Republic
nodes.brief: Ascendant militarily YC128. Rejected Jita-gate involvement; tribal council co-signed Shakor statement.

nodes.name: Amarr Empire
nodes.brief: Catiz I throne. Cast blame on Republic during Warpath cycle.

nodes.name: Intaki Syndicate
nodes.brief: Loose autonomous federation in Syndicate region. Founded by Caldari-sympathetic Intaki exiles after Caldari Rebellion. Each station autonomous; non-political officially.

nodes.name: Ishukone Corporation
nodes.brief: Caldari mega-corp. Mountain/Ocean faction-aligned. Original developer of subcranial nano controllers. Acquired Intaki development rights YC111. Deeply involved in clone-soldier / Templar program through Mens Reppola.

nodes.name: Lai Dai Corporation
nodes.brief: Caldari mega-corp. Forest-faction-aligned. Major beneficiary of Jita IV-4 renovations and Hypernet network. Stole Intaki mind-transfer tech ~YC119. Holds Khanid Amarr ties.

nodes.name: Quafe Company
nodes.brief: Beverage corp. Originally Gallente. Strong Lai Dai contracts via Jita IV-4. Sponsored Roden in election. Major beneficiary of Syndicate annexation — new Quafe stations among first structures built in seized space.

nodes.name: Ytiri
nodes.brief: Ninth-largest Caldari corp. Absorbed by Heth's Provost alliance. Founded Star Seed. Concession statement praised Otro Gariushi — places Ytiri in Ishukone axis.

nodes.name: Star Seed Drink Co.
nodes.brief: Soft-drink corp founded by Ytiri investment division. 'Official soft drink' of Caldari space; campaigned to remove Quafe ads. Centerpiece of Ash's 'Soft Drink Wars' framing.

nodes.name: Evermore
nodes.brief: Successor to Innerbus. President Alexander Ducasse. Operates Paragon Corporation (only non-Caldari station in Jita) and IMN media network. Pre-prepared corporate-AI rollout suggests engineered transition.

nodes.name: Innerbus (defunct)
nodes.brief: Predecessor to Evermore. Amarr-aligned. Old leader died of heart attack mid-Stellar Transmuters dispute over Yulai rescue efforts.

nodes.name: Paragon Corporation
nodes.brief: Evermore subsidiary. Operates the only non-Caldari station in Jita — the structural lever for Ducasse's mediator role.

nodes.name: IMN — Interstellar Media Network
nodes.brief: Evermore-controlled media. Ash flags its post-Jita-gate coverage as targeting Forest-faction (Lai Dai) Jita managers.

nodes.name: CONCORD
nodes.brief: Inter-empire peacekeeping authority. Warpath Protocol failed YC128.04.30 — first targeted system breach since Yulai YC110.

nodes.name: CONCORD Inner Circle
nodes.brief: Inter-empire diplomatic body. Aras Angire heads. Emergency session post-Jita-gate ended early as parties walked out.

nodes.name: Chief Executive Panel
nodes.brief: Caldari governing body composed of mega-corp CEOs. Saraki chairs.

nodes.name: Upwell Consortium
nodes.brief: Citadel-tech consortium. Includes Intaki Bank. Builds EDENCOM ships. Forest-faction / Lai Dai-anchored. Financial exposure to Syndicate collapse is the under-discussed angle per Ash.

nodes.name: Intaki Bank
nodes.brief: Upwell-affiliated. Subsidiary financial entity tied to Syndicate. Counter-insurgency posture vs Deathless. Now structurally compromised.

nodes.name: AIR Laboratories
nodes.brief: Ishukone-built research project. Major CONCORD funding shifted to AIR around the same time — a Mountain/Ocean win against Forest. Former SoE member among AIR leadership.

nodes.name: EDENCOM
nodes.brief: Inter-empire defensive coalition. Ships built by Upwell. Drifter wormhole occupier (one of five). Partnered with Upwell on Sentinel-MZ research.

nodes.name: Mortis Legion
nodes.brief: Mercenary group. Muria Moru leadership. Co-developer of clone-soldier / Templar tech with Ishukone. Granted full military access to Intaki under YC110-era assembly deal.

nodes.name: Sisters of EVE
nodes.brief: Religious humanitarian order; Eve Gate research. Two branches: humanitarian and secret-research. Long-standing Drifter / wormhole research. Sentona Sarpati CEO.

nodes.name: Serpentis Corporation
nodes.brief: Salvador Sarpati. Black-market / drug pipeline. Silphy's collaborator pre-arrest from SoE.

nodes.name: Anoyus Mapping Project (AMP)
nodes.brief: Capsuleer initiative working with Gallente Federation. Continuous monitoring of every system in wormhole space. Founded by Rio Talifo. First public sounding on Drifter-tech risks.

nodes.name: Starkmanir Tribe
nodes.brief: Restored Minmatar tribe. Hidden by Nefantar / Ammatar through the Old Wars. Subject of new 'Starkmanir Strategic Wing' SKIN.

nodes.name: Ammatar Mandate
nodes.brief: Nefantar-administered Amarr buffer state between Amarr and Minmatar highsec. FW-relevant low/highsec mix. Subject of new 'Mandate of Faith' SKIN. Ash's predicted Mil-Campaign #2 zone.

nodes.name: Mountain Faction (Caldari political)
nodes.brief: One of three Caldari sociopolitical factions. Saraki's home faction. Allied with Ocean against Forest in Ash's framework. Ishukone-axis.

nodes.name: Ocean Faction (Caldari political)
nodes.brief: One of three Caldari sociopolitical factions. Mountain ally. Ishukone-axis.

nodes.name: Forest Faction (Caldari political)
nodes.brief: One of three Caldari sociopolitical factions. Lai Dai-axis. Targeted by Mountain/Ocean alignment. Manages Jita-44 / Hypernet revenue per Ash.

nodes.name: Thukker Tribe
nodes.brief: Most distant Minmatar tribe. Operates in Great Wildlands. Wormhole-interested. Some clans defected to Deathless. Anar Abdul leads. Treated as Minmatar-side equivalent of Intaki Syndicate.

nodes.name: Guristas Pirates
nodes.brief: Pirate faction. Historically used by Ishukone to expose Lai Dai corruption. Ash's lead candidate for Warpath message origin ('toys are meant to be played with').

nodes.name: Deathless Circle
nodes.brief: Air-aligned. Absorbing Archbine; operating in Pochven. Counter-target of Intaki Bank operations.

nodes.name: Syndicate Region
nodes.brief: Formerly NPC-nullsec. Caldari sovereign post-YC128.05.05. Strategic value: only NPC-nullsec adjacent to Gallente highsec via PFTAC.

nodes.name: Poitot
nodes.brief: Syndicate's de-facto capital. Only named Syndicate system. Site of Silphy's seat and Caldari operation announcement.

nodes.name: Jita
nodes.brief: New Eden's primary trade hub. All seven gates damaged YC128.04.21. Resident-identity survey: most identify as 'Jita first, Caldari second' — atypical within State.

nodes.name: Jita IV-4 (Caldari Navy Assembly Plant)
nodes.brief: Lai Dai-managed renovation cash-cow station. Hypernet hub. Forest-faction revenue centerpiece. Quafe contracts here.

nodes.name: Solitude (region)
nodes.brief: Gallente highsec island. Now reachable only via Kenninck–Egghelende stargate (Aguard's project).

nodes.name: PFTAC
nodes.brief: Nullsec-highsec adjacency point. Critical breakout-event ingress for Thursday Pelille / Bayet / Orvolle constellations.

nodes.name: Drifter Hyperspace Network
nodes.brief: Drifter-origin data-transfer / hyperspace infrastructure. Manipulated for Jita-gate attack. Access only through wormhole-occupier experimentation. Five occupiers: Amarr, Caldari, EDENCOM, Minmatar, Triglavians.

nodes.name: Highsec Cyno Beacon Technology
nodes.brief: Illegal/captured cyno tech bypassing empire jamming. Canon since YC123 dread assaults. Re-weaponized for Syndicate breakout.

nodes.name: Prismatic / Fractured Sites
nodes.brief: New sites containing destroyed Drifter-structure wrecks (wormhole-generator wreckage matches Pochven hardware). Confirms Drifter origin of Catalyst-era anomalies.

nodes.name: Hollow Clone Disaster
nodes.brief: Cloning failure cascade emerging during Crimson Harvest. Ash's theory: caused by Drifter-tech meddling. Order of St. Tetrimon now performing cleansing burns.

nodes.name: Soft Drink Wars
nodes.brief: Ash's framing: Quafe (Lai Dai) vs Star Seed (Ishukone). Allegations include nanocontroller-laced soft drinks influencing Gallente senatorial elections. Self-flagged 'tinfoil'.

nodes.name: Lai Dai vs Ishukone Axis
nodes.brief: Ash's whiteboard: durable rivalry running through 20+ years of Caldari political realignment. Mountain+Ocean faction cluster on Ishukone side; Forest on Lai Dai side. Subordinate alignments: SoE / Mountain / Mortis Legion / Ytiri / Star Seed (Ishukone) vs NOH / CBD / Forest / Quafe / Sarpati (Lai Dai).

nodes.name: Warpath Message Text
nodes.brief: Verbatim CCP text appearing on all impacted CONCORD terminals: 'Warpath, a gift dear empires. After all, toys are meant to be played with.' Origin unattributed; Ash leads Guristas, rules out Deathless / EOM / Sansha.

nodes.name: Military Campaigns (YC128 expansion feature)
nodes.brief: Upcoming Faction Warfare expansion mechanic. Ash predicts first campaign = Fate of Syndicate (Caldari hold vs Gallente liberation); second = Ammatar Mandate (Starkmanir vs Nefantar).

nodes.name: Zephyr Exploration Ship
nodes.brief: Solar-sail propulsion, sleeper-ignored. Distributed YC111 by Syndicate to all capsuleers. Carried covert telemetry/sensor packages funneling wormhole data to Ishukone via the Antagonists pipeline.

nodes.name: Subcranial Nano Controllers
nodes.brief: Original Ishukone mind-control tech. Banned and replaced — but Ishukone proceeded to bulk-sell trans-cranial microcontrollers to Amarr holders YC111 immediately before Intaki dev-rights win.

nodes.name: SKIN: State Regulator (SYN-0041)
nodes.brief: Caldari SKIN tagged 'SYN-0041'. Unexplained Syndicate marker. Ash reads as Mil-Campaign zone tag.

nodes.name: SKIN: President's Decree
nodes.brief: Gallente SKIN. Special agents under direct presidential autonomy. Ties Moreau personally to anti-Caldari ops.

nodes.name: SKIN: Mandate of Faith
nodes.brief: Amarr SKIN. Empress Catiz I calls; Ammatar Mandate answers. Reads as Amarr-side Mil-Campaign zone.

nodes.name: SKIN: Starkmanir Strategic Wing
nodes.brief: Minmatar SKIN. Starkmanir tribal-strategy framing. Pairs with Mandate-of-Faith to suggest Ammatar/Starkmanir vs Nefantar campaign axis.

nodes.name: Drone Graviton Emitter
nodes.brief: Item from Catalyst-era drone event. Drops from sentient rogue drones / highsec drone sites; turn-in for Consortium tractor blueprints. Ash's theory: ties to needle-jack filament technology potentially developed by rogue drones.

_curation_notes: Phase 0 success metric is 30 nodes / 50 connections in 2 hours. This corpus delivers 56 / 78 — extraction took ~3 hours across five transcripts. Adjust scope-vs-time before next pass.
Lai-Dai-vs-Ishukone axis is the densest region (12 organizations, 9 cross-axis connections). This is the demo region — load this on the Board view first.
Confidence ≤ 0.5 connections all carry contested-by tags — most cite Ash self-flagging 'tinfoil'. Filter ≥ 0.7 for the 'I'd defend on stream' view.
Ammatar tourism transcript (40K words) was pulled but deferred. Run a second extraction pass to reinforce the Mil-Campaign #2 prediction region.

Open canon questions left unresolved: (1) origin of Warpath message, (2) Lifegiver=Gable confidence, (3) extent of Quafe nanocontroller allegation, (4) Ducasse-Saraki coordination, (5) Sentona Sarpati current whereabouts.
Fix-on-import: per_akimaka_saraki member-of org_lai_dai was an error in the previous pass — corrected here to org_mountain_faction (Ishukone-axis). Check no other axis assignments inverted.

Drifter-tech access list is hard canon: Amarr / Caldari / EDENCOM / Minmatar / Triglavians ONLY. This rules out Gallente as direct Jita-gate operator — chained-cause connection to Caldari accusation is structurally weak.
